query:
UPDATE partner_cities pc
JOIN partners p ON p.id = pc.partnerId
JOIN users u ON u.id = p.userId
SET pc.contractStatus = 'active',
    pc.currentProfitStage = 1,
    pc.isInvestmentRecovered = false
WHERE u.name LIKE '%许博睿%';

-- 验证更新
SELECT 
  u.name as userName,
  p.name as partnerName,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus
FROM partner_cities pc
JOIN partners p ON p.id = pc.partnerId
JOIN users u ON u.id = p.userId
JOIN cities c ON c.id = pc.cityId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%许博睿%';
